title: Modpack Monsters
body:
![](https://i.imgur.com/F8Nbq8s.png)

**Modpack Monsters is a Cobblemon modpack with a few extras. While the main focus is catching, battling, and training with your monster pals, there are also other mods to tackle. These include ComputerCraft, Create, and Alloy Forgery. All mods to help build the world around you to assist in your journey.**

The pack also includes many mods that optimize the vanilla experience in both performance and quality of life. Mods like Adorn and Chipped can help you build cities and gyms to really take your experience to the next level. Iron Chests, Waystones, and Gliders can help you stay organized and on the move hunting down new biomes with Terralith. All the while your FPS will be saved by mods like Sodium, Phosphor, and Memory Leak Fix.

Best of luck on your Cobblemon journey!

------------------------------------

This modpack contains the following mods from xaero96:
* [Xaero's Minimap](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap)
* [Xaero's World Map](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-world-map)
